title: Project Echo
description: Introduces new ores, materials, and blocks inspired by removed and unreleased Minecraft features, as well as some of my own ideas.
body:
![Project Echo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af50293392f3ced16e7baa52c76c9fc3cf1766ff_0.webp)

Bringing back the forgotten, the removed, and the never-seen-before!

Have you ever wished Minecraft kept all its cool features, or added the ones players have been asking for years?
Project Echo brings them to life, mixing content from Minecraft Education Edition, Minecraft Earth, classic mods, and features removed or never added to the vanilla game, plus some ideas of my own!

**🌟 Current Features:**
- **Emerald Haven – Villagers' Dimension**
- Steel, Emerald Tools and Armor
- Salt and Magnesium for new crafting possibilities
- Ruby and Rose Gold ores for fresh tools and gear
- Cobalt, a rare and powerful material
- Underwater Torch and TNT for deep-sea adventures
- Amethyst and Watermelon Tourmaline
- New baubles
![Heart Of Steel](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8985b004db286a6eeb5c93f3f87acebc71fbf9e1.png)
**✨ Planned Features:**

- Player-driven development: comment your ideas, and they might be added!

This mod is made for the community, a place where your Minecraft dreams can become reality.
Texture used in the mod screenshots: New Default+
Shader used in the screenshots: Tea Shaders

**Discord**
